UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE FACTS: RE TOLLING REGARDING CAUSES OF ACTION 2, 3, 5, 6, 8, 9, 10, 12-15, 17, AND 22; RE CAUSE OF ACTION 19 TO ALLEGE DUTY AND BREACH OF IT; RE CAUSE OF ACTION 8 TO ALLEGE TERMS OF CONTRACT BREACHED; RE CAUSES OF ACTION 3, 6, 12, AND 14 TO ALLEGE FRAUD WITH PARTICULARITY AND DIFFERENTIATING BETWEEN DEFENDANTS; RE CUASES OF ACTION 11 AND 16 TO REALLEGE AS REMEDY AND OR DOCTRINE BASED ON OTHER CAUSES OF ACTION; RE CAUSES OF ACTION 7, 9, 11, 13, 15, 17, 18, 19 AND 20 TO ALLEGE TENDER OR EXEMPTION FROM IT. OVERRULED CAUSES OF ACTION 1 AND 4 NOT ADDRESSED IN POINTS AND AUTHORITIES. SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND CAUSE OF ACTION 21 NOT ADDRESSED IN OPPOSITION. PREVAILING PARTY PREPARE ORDER. Off Calendar Dec-13-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Sustained with leave to amend to allege facts: re tolling regarding causes of action 2, 3, 5, 6, 8, 9, 10, 12-15, 17, and 22; re cause of action 19 to allege duty and breach of it; re cause of action 8 to allege terms of contract breached; re causes of action 3, 6, 12, and 14 to allege fraud with particularity and differentiating between defendants; re cuases of action 11 and 16 to reallege as remedy and or doctrine based on other causes of action; re causes of action 7, 9, 11, 13, 15, 17, 18, 19 and 20 to allege tender or exemption from it. Overruled causes of action 1 and 4 not addressed in points and authorities. Sustained without leave to amend cause of action 21 not addressed in opposition. Prevailing party prepare order. Judge Ronald E Quidachay, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (501/REQ)
